content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Nexpanse: Product Manager (B2C Subscription Utilities) Anywhere in the World 🇦🇪 United Arab Emirates, 🇧🇾 Belarus, 🇬🇪 Georgia, 🇰🇿 Kazakhstan, 🇷🇸 Serbia, and 🇷🇺 Russian Federation Delaware A/B Testing, AI Product Development, Product Roadmapping, and Claude.ai Product Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5084/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> USA, Delaware <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.nexpanse.io/">https://www.nexpanse.io/</a> </p> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"><strong>Role</strong></p> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5">You own the product from launch. The core metric is paying users with positive unit economics.</p> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5">This is a role at the intersection of product and marketing: you grow the product by changing it — funnel, landing pages, paywall, features.</p> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5">You'll be vibecoding a lot and actively involved in product development. Your pet projects and obsession with AI coding and AI agents matter much more than years of formal experience. If you spend your evenings building your own stuff, trying to monetize it, testing ideas — that's exactly what we're looking for.</p> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5">&nbsp;</p> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"><strong>What you'll be doing</strong></p> <ol class="framer-text"> <li class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"><strong class="framer-text">Product-led growth.</strong> Identify and ship product changes that drive growth: landing pages, funnels, paywall, features.</p> </li> <li class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"><strong class="framer-text">Performance and SEO as tools.</strong> Understand the channels (Google, Meta, TikTok, SEO), formulate hypotheses and requirements, evaluate results — without buying media yourself.</p> </li> <li class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"><strong class="framer-text">Vibecoding.</strong> Quickly build and iterate on the product (landing pages, prototypes, simple features) using no-code and AI tools. This is an ongoing process, not one-off tests.</p> </li> <li class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"><strong class="framer-text">Subscription model.</strong> Pricing, trial, paywall, retention.</p> </li> <li class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"><strong class="framer-text">Analytics.</strong> CAC, LTV, retention — understand where the economics break.</p> </li> <li class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"><strong class="framer-text">AI and automation.</strong> Use AI to move faster: creatives, prototypes, analytics, AI agents for routine tasks.</p> </li> </ol> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Who we're looking for&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul class="framer-text"> <li class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5">Middle-level experience.</p> </li> <li class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"><strong>Russian - native language. English - A2+</strong></p> </li> <li class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5">Hands-on experience with B2C subscription utilities.</p> </li> <li class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5">Strong plus: ex-founder / solopreneur background.</p> </li> <li class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"><strong class="framer-text">Pet projects are a must.</strong> Show us what you've built yourself: an AI agent, a utility, a website, a micro-SaaS, something you've put up for sale.</p> </li> <li class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5">Obsession with AI: AI coding, AI agents, new tools, experiments with monetizing your own ideas.</p> </li> <li class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"><strong class="framer-text">Vibecoding is required</strong> (no-code, AI tools like v0 / Bolt / Lovable / Cursor, basic coding skills).</p> </li> <li class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5">Technical foundation: you've written code before, you're writing it now, or you have a technical degree.</p> </li> <li class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5">Systems thinking, proactive mindset.</p> </li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Who we're not looking for</strong></p> <ul class="framer-text"> <li class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5">People who don't understand how subscription products work.</p> </li> <li class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5">PMs from R&amp;D and B2B backgrounds (without production product experience).</p> </li> <li class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5">People used to working only inside large structures and teams.</p> </li> <li class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5">People without their own experiments / pet projects.</p> </li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>What we offer</strong></p> <ul class="framer-text"> <li class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5">Full-time, remote.</p> </li> <li class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5">Salary: discussed individually.</p> </li> <li class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5"> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-10u8qh5">Small team, direct contact with the founder.</p> </li> </ul> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/nexpanse-product-manager-b2c-subscription-utilities">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/nexpanse-product-manager-b2c-subscription-utilities</a></p>
